/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/link.d -shared  -o backwater_swe2d.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cpp/src/swe2d_mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cpp/src/swe2d_numerics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cpp/src/swe2d_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cpp/src/swe2d_bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cpp/src/swe2d_gpu.cu.o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
